channel.title: CapeAdrenaline Products
channel.description: Bookable CapeAdrenaline quad biking and buggy adventures in Cape Town and the Western Cape.

item.g:title: Quadbiking 1hr
item.g:description: Guided quad biking from Trails End Hotel in the Grabouw mountains with scenic trails, rugged terrain, a waterfall stop, and wide-open views with an experienced guide.

item.g:title: Capetown couple forest adventure plus waterfall stop
item.g:description: Guided couple buggy forest adventure from Trails End Hotel in the Grabouw mountains with scenic trails, rugged terrain, a waterfall stop, and photo-friendly views.

item.g:title: Atlantis dune quad biking 1hr
item.g:description: Guided one-hour quadbike tour at Atlantis Dunes, Cape Town with safety briefing, equipment fitting, off-road dune riding, and an experienced guide.
item.g:product_type: Adventure tours > Quad biking > Atlantis Dunes

item.g:title: Atlantis dune quad biking 40min
item.g:description: Guided 40-minute quadbike tour at Atlantis Dunes, Cape Town with safety briefing, equipment fitting, off-road dune riding, and an experienced guide.
item.g:product_type: Adventure tours > Quad biking > Atlantis Dunes
